title: Fix WIDTH false positive with multidimesional packed arrays

features.name: packed struct member array indexing with narrow arithmetic expression
features.description: Code should include a struct packed member with a multidimensional array that is indexed using an arithmetic expression between two narrow types (e.g., 4-bit variables)

features.name: subtraction with matching narrow bit-width operands
features.description: Code should include subtraction between two operands that both have the same narrow bit-width (e.g., 4 bits), used as an array index
